title: Gladiator - NoLimits Coaster
description: Here it is, my new NoLimits coaster that I've been building for a while, but have been postponing the release due to my new SpongeBob video making craze :D But here it is, my new floorless coaster, Gladiator, with 6 inversions: 1 vertical loop, 1 zero-g-roll, 1 cobra roll, and 2 interlocking corkscrews. Theme is Orange with yellow supports...two trains, one blue and one orange, 6 rows per train and 4 seats per row. I tried making the supports more realistic, and used Kraken (Seaworld Orlando) and Kumba (Busch gardens Africa) as inspirations to help shape this ride and its supports
